description_long: This kindergarten building features a compact, rectangular layout with a mix of low-rise structures and open outdoor areas. The exterior includes several play structures, such as colorful climbing frames and slides, situated on a green play surface. The main building is surrounded by a low fence and is composed of light-colored walls with large windows, allowing for ample natural light. The outdoor area is divided into distinct zones, including a playground and a small garden or grassy patch. The rooflines are flat, and the overall design is functional and child-friendly, with clear separation between play and indoor spaces. The use of bright colors and open spaces creates an inviting and safe environment for young children.
description: A compact, light-colored kindergarten with large windows, fenced outdoor play areas, and colorful playground equipment. The design is functional, child-friendly, and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, fenced playground, and colorful play structures on a green surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated layout, visible play equipment, and the transition from outdoor to indoor spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the building, additional playground equipment, and the extent of the fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the building, more playground features, and the boundary fence.
attribute_architectural_style: modern functional with flat roofs and large windows
